name: Meyer Lemon Sherbet
recipeInstructions:
1. Ream juice from lemons (about 2 lbs. per cup of juice) and grate the peel; set aside.
2. Combine gelatin and 1/4 cup cold water in a small bowl; set aside until softened, about 5 minutes.
3. In a 3-quart pan over high heat, bring sugar and 1 cup water to a boil.
4. Reduce heat and simmer until the sugar is dissolved, about 1 minute.
5. Stir in gelatin mixture, lemon peel, and juice; add milk (mixture may look curdled).
6. Place the pan in a bowl of ice water and stir often until cold, 8 to 10 minutes.
7. Freeze the mixture in an ice cream maker according to the manufacturer's directions.
